content.speakerText: So how's the client onboarding project coming along?
content.speakerTextCn: 客户入驻项目进展如何？

options.text: We've onboarded 85% of targets—up from 60% last quarter.
I don't know, maybe next week?
The clients are happy, but I'm tired.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用具体数据（85% vs 60%）支撑汇报，符合场景要求。其他选项要么模糊（I guess）、要么回避问题（maybe next week）、要么偏离主题（提到个人感受），均不符合专业进度汇报标准。

content.speakerText: Any major blockers slowing things down?
content.speakerTextCn: 有什么主要障碍拖慢进度吗？

options.text: Everything is perfect, no issues at all.
The API integration’s delayed—we’re waiting on their dev team.
I think someone forgot to send an email.
I’m not sure, maybe the weather?

content.explanation: 正确答案明确指出具体障碍（API集成延迟）并暗示解决方案（等待对方开发团队），符合‘说明问题带解决方案倾向’的要求。其他选项要么过度乐观（perfect）、要么轻描淡写（forgot an email）、要么无关（weather），缺乏专业性和建设性。

content.speakerText: Can you give me an update on the Q3 marketing campaign?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能给我更新一下Q3营销活动的进展吗？

options.text: We’re at 72% of our lead generation goal and 89% of conversion targets, with the social media rollout completed ahead of schedule.
It’s kind of okay, I guess.
I’m not in charge of that, you should ask Sarah.
The campaign is running, but I’m not sure about numbers.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用精确数据（72%, 89%）和具体进展（social media rollout completed ahead of schedule），体现专业汇报能力。其他选项或模糊、或推卸责任、或缺乏信息，均不符合进度汇报场景的核心要求。
